title: YTSS Medium
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"9iusu","text":"YTSS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":4}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7o32l","text":"                         per 500 ml","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9mvfk","text":"     1/2 1/10   Trypton 1.25 g 0.25 g   Yeast Extract 2 g 0.4 g   Sea Salts 10 g 10 g   Agar 7.5-9 g 7.5-9 g   ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":5,"length":3},{"style":"bold","offset":9,"length":4}],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":111}],"data":[]},{"key":"em54c","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6v47c","text":"For TM1040, use 1/2 YTSS, 30C, in dark, 200-250 rpm if in liquid;","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"43moh","text":"For Jannaschia CCS1 and CCS2, use 1/10 YTSS, 22-24C, in dark, 200-250 rpm if in liquid. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"19gs0","text":"For all other Roseos, use 1/2 YTSS.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2djbq","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"blf2","text":"Note from Matt: The 1/2x (30°C+shaking) is for the bugs that are more coastal, and the 1/10thx (22-24°C + shaking) is for the bugs that are more open ocean.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"atio4","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8e8q","text":"Sea Salts: use 100 kDa permeate from TFF seawater to prepare media and this will take care of “sea salts” for the medium.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"tables","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"cellsMeta":{"0_0":"","0_1":"","0_2":"","1_0":"","1_1":"","1_2":"","2_0":"","2_1":"","2_2":"","3_0":"","3_1":"","3_2":"","4_0":"","4_1":"","4_2":""},"colWidths":[null,null,null],"data":[[" ","\u003cstrong\u003e1/2\u003c/strong\u003e","\u003cstrong\u003e1/10\u003c/strong\u003e"],["Trypton","1.25 g","0.25 g"],["Yeast Extract","2 g","0.4 g"],["Sea Salts","10 g","10 g"],["Agar","7.5-9 g","7.5-9 g"]],"guid":"C0D098D0457F11E99ACDFF15730CFDB3","legend":"","mergeCells":[],"rowHeights":[],"show_headers":true}}}}
